name: blackr
title: Blackr
description: Turn your main display black for quick screen cleaning.
author: li_jin

commands.name: blackr
commands.title: Blackr
commands.description: Cover the main display with a black cleaning screen.

preferences.name: durationSeconds
preferences.title: Cleaning Duration
preferences.description: How long Blackr should stay active before exiting automatically, in seconds.

scripts.build: npm run build-native && ray build -e dist
